trigger_rules:
ESCALATION CHECK: Perform at end of each round if ANY of:
  - Any enemy figures were removed from play
  - A crew member reached an objective
  - End of Round 1, if enemy outnumbered by 3+
Max 3 escalation rolls per battle. Roll D100 by enemy AI type.

escalation_effects.name: Morale Increase
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Morale Increase. Enemy Panic range reduced by -1 (1-3→1-2, 1-2→1, 1→Fearless) for rest of battle. If already Fearless, treat as Fighting Intensifies.

escalation_effects.name: Fighting Intensifies
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Fighting Intensifies. Random enemy: +1 Combat Skill, +1 Toughness (max 5) for rest of battle.

escalation_effects.name: Reinforcements!
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Reinforcements! 2 basic enemies arrive from random edge (D6: 1-2 left, 3-4 right, 5-6 enemy edge) at center. If enemy base Combat +0, 3 arrive instead (1 is specialist).

escalation_effects.name: Regroup
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Regroup. Each enemy makes bonus move to most distant position in Cover with LoS and in weapon range. If outnumbered, +1 basic enemy adjacent to random enemy.

escalation_effects.name: Sniper!
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Sniper! Place new enemy on tallest terrain. Armed with Marksman's Rifle, +1 Combat Skill (max +2).

escalation_effects.name: Ambush!
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Ambush! Select crew furthest to left or right. Place 2 new basic enemies halfway between that side edge and the selected crew figure.

escalation_effects.name: Covering Fire
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Covering Fire. Enemy closest to your edge moves up to 3" (stay in Cover), then throws Frakk grenade (if within 6") or fires weapon. 1-Shot weapons get +1 to Hit.

escalation_effects.name: Unconventional Tactics
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Unconventional Tactics. Next round, all crew members count as Reaction score 1.

escalation_effects.name: Rush Attack
escalation_effects.instruction: ESCALATION: Rush Attack. All enemies make full move immediately, entering Brawl if possible. If outnumbered, +2 basic enemies adjacent to enemy closest to enemy edge.
